title: MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: LINCOLN COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lincoln County Behavioral Health offers counseling and case management to adults, adolescents, children and families. Offers group, family and/or individual counseling for problems addressing self-esteem, appropriate expression of feelings and healthy boundaries, coping skills, children with behaviors and/or emotional problems and parenting, medication evaluation and management, support and peer-building relation, panic and anxiety issues. 51 SW Lee Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 265-0601 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Child and Family Mental Health (541) 265-0601 Newport Adult Mental Health (541) 574-5960 Newport INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured or under-insured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LINCOLN COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINCOLN COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
